infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: My-Cura uses your location to verify you are at the care recipient's address when clocking in.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: My-Cura uses your location for GPS clock-in verification.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: My-Cura uses the camera for barcode scanning and visit photos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: My-Cura uses the microphone for voice notes.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: My-Cura uses Face ID for quick, secure login.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: My-Cura accesses your photos to attach them to visit notes.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow My-Cura to use your location for GPS clock-in.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow My-Cura to access the camera.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow My-Cura to use Face ID for authentication.
